name: Pork Chops W/Apples & Sweet & Sour
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon tomato paste (to give color, sometimes I substitute with ketchup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
2. Set aside.
3. Cut the apples into quarters and discard the core.
4. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet.
5. Dredge the chops in flour.
6. Cook chops until browned on one side, about 5 minutes.
7. Flip chops and cook another 5 minutes.
8. Remove chops and add diced apples to the pan. Cook for about 2 minutes, stirring often.
9. Take out the apples and pour off excess fat from the skillet.
10. Add shallots and vinegar; stir briefly.
11. Incorporate broth and honey. Cook for 1 minute.
12. Stir in tomato paste.
13. Return chops and apples to the pan.
14. Spoon sauce over the meat, cover tightly, and cook for 10 minutes.
15. Serve pork chops covered with sauce.
